name: Web - XSS Attack Attempt
description: Detects Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attempts in web requests. Covers reflected XSS via URI/query parameters including script tags, event handlers, javascript: URIs, and common encoding bypass techniques.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval full_request=lower(uri)."|".(if(isnotnull(uri_query), lower(uri_query), "")) | eval xss_match=case( match(full_request, "<script"), "Script tag", match(full_request, "javascript:"), "JS URI", match(full_request, "on(load|error|click|mouseover|focus|blur|change|submit|keyup|keydown)\s*="), "Event handler", match(full_request, "<(iframe|object|embed|svg|img|body|link|meta)[^>]*(src|href|xlink:href|action)\s*="), "Tag injection", match(full_request, "(%3cscript|%3c%2fscript|%253c)"), "URL-encoded XSS", match(full_request, "expression\s*\("), "CSS expression", match(full_request, "vbscript:"), "VBScript URI", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(xss_match) | stats count as hit_count, values(xss_match) as xss_types, values(uri) as uris, values(status) as status_codes, dc(uri) as unique_endpoints by src_ip, host | eval severity="high" | eval mitre="T1059.007" | sort -hit_count | table src_ip, host, hit_count, unique_endpoints, xss_types, status_codes, uris, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
